layout.title: FINANCES
layout.subtitle: Overview, transactions and recurring costs in one place

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.deleteIncomeDescription: The income will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
transactions.deleteRecurringDescription: This will only delete this month's recurring payment. The recurring cost itself will remain active.
transactions.deleteExpenseDescription: The expense will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

recurring.title: Recurring costs & subscriptions
recurring.description: Recurring payments that are deducted automatically every month.
recurring.deleteConfirmDescription: The recurring cost will be removed from the list. This action cannot be undone.

netWorth.title: Net worth
netWorth.subtitle: Assets, liabilities and trend for the selected period.
netWorth.noAssets: No assets yet — add the first one.
netWorth.noLiabilitiesDemo: No liabilities — add a sample loan or credit.
netWorth.collapsedMessage: The card is collapsed — click "Expand" to see the full correction history, change the amount or description, or delete entries.
netWorth.expandedDescription: Each correction stores an amount and a description. You can change the amount (the account balance recalculates), fix the description, or delete the entry — the correction will then be reverted from the balance.
netWorth.noAdjustmentsDemo: No entries — make a correction to an asset or liability.
netWorth.deleteAdjustmentConfirmDescriptionApi: We'll revert this correction's effect on the linked account's balance. This action cannot be undone.
netWorth.deleteAdjustmentConfirmDescriptionDemo: We'll revert this correction's effect on the position's balance in demo mode.
netWorth.cannotDeleteDescription: This entry isn't linked to any demo position (e.g. an old record). Remove it from the list only, or fix the data manually.
netWorth.deletePositionConfirmDescription: The account will disappear from your net worth, and related history corrections will be permanently deleted.
netWorth.deleteLiabilityConfirmDescription: The item will be removed from the list. Related history entries (for this account) will disappear too.
netWorth.deleteAssetConfirmDescription: The item will be removed from the list. Related history entries (for this asset) will disappear too.
netWorth.cannotRecalculateError: Can't recalculate the balance — this entry isn't linked to any demo position.
netWorth.cannotUndoAmountError: Can't undo the amount — this entry isn't linked to any demo position.

analytics.insightsDescMobile: A summary of the analysis for the selected month.
analytics.insightsDescDesktop: Food and recurring costs are calculated for the month picked in the selector (compared to the previous month). Weekday ranking uses the same period as the "Expenses by weekday" chart.
analytics.foodNoData: No expenses were recorded in the Food category this month or last month.
analytics.foodThisMonthOnly: This month: {{amount}} zł. No data for this category last month — no percentage comparison available.
analytics.foodSimilar: Food spending is at a similar level to last month.
analytics.foodIncrease: Up by about {{pct}}% compared to last month.
analytics.foodDecrease: Down by about {{pct}}% compared to last month.
analytics.foodPrevOnly: There were food expenses last month, but none this month.
analytics.biggestLineEmpty: No expenses in the selected month.
analytics.weekdayLine: You spend the most on {{weekday}}: {{amount}} zł (total for the chart's period).
analytics.weekdayLineEmpty: No expenses in the chart's period.
analytics.fixedLineNoIncome: No income in the selected month — the recurring cost share can't be calculated.
analytics.fixedLine: Active recurring costs ({{fixed}} zł / mo.) are about {{pct}}% of this month's income ({{income}} zł).
analytics.cardVsCashDesc: Summary of transactions with a labeled payment method in the selected period (excluding recurring costs).
analytics.noLabeledTransactions: No transactions labeled card or cash in this period.
analytics.savingsTrendTooltipTitle: Running total of surpluses and deficits from consecutive points on the chart.

transactionModal.selectPaymentAlert: Choose a payment method: card or cash.

recurringModal.convertedPreview: ≈ {{amount}} / mo. at the current NBP rate

netWorthAccountCreateModal.capitalizeHint: The first letter will be saved as uppercase.
netWorthAccountCreateModal.colorHint: The asset's icon and amount will use this color.
netWorthAccountCreateModal.liabilityAmountHint: This is the size of the liability. Record later repayments as a negative correction.
netWorthAccountCreateModal.assetAmountHint: Starting balance; make changes later via a correction on the item's card.

netWorthCorrectionModal.title: Edit item
netWorthCorrectionModal.assetAmountHint: A positive amount increases the asset's value, negative decreases it. Leave it at 0 if you're only changing the icon or color.
netWorthCorrectionModal.liabilityAmountHint: A positive amount increases the debt, negative is a repayment. Leave it at 0 if you're only changing the icon.

netWorthAdjustModal.title: Correction: {{position}}
netWorthAdjustModal.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: e.g. ATM withdrawal, top-up to wallet…

netWorthAdjustmentEditModal.title: History correction
netWorthAdjustmentEditModal.description: Changing the amount recalculates the linked account's balance. Deleting the entry reverts this correction's full amount from the balance.

netWorthAdjustmentDescriptionModal.title: Edit correction description
netWorthAdjustmentDescriptionModal.infoText: The entry's amount and date stay unchanged — you're only editing the description shown in history.

expenseCategoryPicker.deleteCategoryConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Existing expenses may keep the old category name.
